title: Add Indexes for Search Performance

tasks.description: Create NameIndex for O(1) entity lookup - Implement Map-based index with build(), get(), add(), remove(), has() methods
Create TypeIndex for efficient type-based queries - Implement Map<type, Set<entityNames>> index with case-insensitive type handling
Create LowercaseCache to avoid repeated toLowerCase() calls - Pre-compute lowercase versions of all searchable fields (name, type, observations, tags)
acceptanceCriteria: Pre-computed lowercase for all searchable fields

tasks.description: Integrate indexes with GraphStorage - Add all three indexes to GraphStorage, build on graph load, update on mutations, expose accessor methods
acceptanceCriteria: All three indexes integrated into GraphStorage

tasks.description: Update search classes to use indexes - Modify BasicSearch, BooleanSearch, FuzzySearch to use getLowercased() and getEntitiesByType()
acceptanceCriteria: All search classes use getLowercased() for comparisons
Term is lowercased once, not per entity

successCriteria: No repeated toLowerCase() calls during search
notes: This sprint eliminates full table scans on every search. The LowercaseCache is particularly important as the current code does toLowerCase() on every entity field for every search comparison. With 10,000 entities and 10 observations each, that's 100,000+ toLowerCase() calls per search.
